context: Tests whether the agent scaffolds a production-ready Fastify server using env-schema for config validation, close-with-grace for graceful shutdown, @fastify/under-pressure for load shedding, and proper TypeScript setup with Node.js type stripping. Also checks that anti-patterns like config files and NODE_ENV checks are avoided.

checklist.name: env-schema used
checklist.description: Uses the `env-schema` package to validate environment variables (import from 'env-schema' or 'env-schema/index.js')

checklist.name: No config file imports
checklist.description: Does NOT import configuration from JSON files or per-environment JS/TS files (no `import config from './config/...'` or dynamic `import('./config/${env}')`)

checklist.name: No NODE_ENV branching
checklist.description: Does NOT use `process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production'` (or similar) for conditional application logic — uses explicit env var flags instead

checklist.name: close-with-grace used
checklist.description: Uses the `close-with-grace` package for graceful shutdown (import from 'close-with-grace', calls closeWithGrace())

checklist.name: @fastify/under-pressure registered
checklist.description: Registers `@fastify/under-pressure` plugin on the Fastify instance

checklist.name: Log redaction configured
checklist.description: Configures Pino logger redact option to mask at least one of: authorization header, password field, token field, or secret field

checklist.name: Node.js type stripping in scripts
checklist.description: package.json scripts use `node app.ts` or `node src/server.ts` (NOT ts-node, tsx, tsc compilation, or npx ts-node)

checklist.name: TypeBox used for config schema
checklist.description: Uses `@sinclair/typebox` Type.Object() to define the env-schema schema (not plain JSON Schema object literal)

checklist.name: Config decorate/plugin pattern
checklist.description: Configuration is loaded in a fastify-plugin and attached via fastify.decorate('config', ...) rather than as a global variable

checklist.name: Server listens on configurable host
checklist.description: app.listen() uses host value from configuration (not hardcoded '127.0.0.1' or 'localhost')
